## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential collaboration between Hims and GrowthX for content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented custom workflows and sample content for Hims, showcasing their AI-powered content generation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Hims team expressed interest but needs to review with editorial team; concerns about content quality, fact-checking, and scalability were discussed](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasized flexibility in adapting to Hims' specific needs, including incorporating brand guidelines and legal requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Generation Approach

  - [Combines strategy, execution, workflows, experts-in-loop, and automation](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Achieves high quality, fast results at competitive costs](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Custom workflows built for Hims in a short timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Process includes research, title generation, outlining, drafting, SEO optimization, polishing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [GrowthX analyzed Hims' competitors, particularly GoodRx](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Noted significant traffic volume for Hims despite fewer pages compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Identified potential for rapid, high-quality content scaling as a competitive advantage](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Content Generation Demo

  - [Showcased sample article on Finasteride vs. Minoxidil](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to generate structured, detailed content quickly](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Highlighted potential for customization based on drug types and user concerns](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Scalability and Speed

  - [GrowthX claims capability to produce thousands of pages rapidly (e.g., 5,000 pages in one month if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Biggest bottlenecks typically involve client-side review processes](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Initial calibration period crucial for streamlining future content production](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Content Quality and Compliance

  - [Ability to incorporate custom knowledge bases, trusted sources, and blacklisted competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Custom fact-checker can provide multiple sources for each statistic or claim](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Can integrate Hims' existing claim stock and brand guidelines into the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Capability to retroactively update content across all pages if new guidelines or legal requirements emerge](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Integration with Hims' Existing Systems

  - [Discussion needed on how GrowthX's content would plug into Hims' page assembly and templates](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [GrowthX expressed willingness to adapt their process to Hims' specific needs and insights](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up discussion to dive deeper into Hims' ideal content generation scenario](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Hims team to regroup internally, with Mike Anderson (closest to editorial team) as primary point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare more detailed proposal based on Hims' specific volume and quality requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Explore potential for significantly scaling up page creation velocity (5x-10x current estimates)](https://fathom.video/share/Ua-VfKwJY7DpsT8eVvQRSPxS6yy56b5Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
